prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 60mm compressor wheel) paired with a **Ford SVT 2.5L Duratec V6 (engine code: YS**) forged internals build, including **Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 compression)**, **Eagle H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Crower billet crankshaft** for 22psi boost handling and 400whp potential.

Install a **Motec M150 ECU** with custom **YS-specific flex-fuel mapping** and **Bosch 1,000cc EV14 injectors**, paired with a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** and **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** to manage heat under sustained high-RPM loads (8,500 RPM redline).

Replace the stock **Getrag MTX-75 transmission** with a **Tremec TR-3650 5-speed** (from a **Ford Mustang SVT Cobra**) using a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** and **Ford Racing aluminum flywheel**, paired with a **Quaife ATB differential** and **Cusco 1.5-way LSD** for aggressive power delivery to the front wheels.
estetica: Install a **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (Contour SVT-specific, 3-piece FRP construction) with **custom 5.5cm front and 7cm rear fender flares**, paired with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear)** and **Nitto NT05R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)** for aggressive stance.

Replace the stock bumper with a **Seibon carbon fiber front lip splitter** (Contour SVT-specific, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment) and **APR Performance GT-250 rear wing** (adjustable angle, 6061 aluminum construction) for downforce at high speeds (tuned for 150+ mph stability).

Full **PPG Ford Performance Blue (Code: M7083)** respray with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap accents** (hood, roof, mirror caps), paired with **VLED 7200K HID projector headlights** and **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights** (clear lens, smoked housing) for a Euro-JDM hybrid aesthetic.
